title: koanophyllon littorale
intro: Koanophyllon littorale, also known as the sea-aster, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Koanophyllon littorale include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Koanophyllon littorale include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
